description: Milestone 6: Opt-in push notifications for Messages and Todos only, with transparent controls and privacy-first defaults. Implement device token registration, notification settings, and deep links to relevant screens.

userStories.title: Notification permission flow and settings UI
userStories.description: Add opt-in notification permissions with transparent settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Profile/Settings includes notification toggles: Messages, Todos (default off)
Request permission only after user explicitly enables a toggle
Clear copy explains what will be sent and what will not be tracked
Context7 consulted for UNUserNotificationCenter best practices and permission UX; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: APNs device token registration and secure storage
userStories.description: Register for remote notifications and store device token securely for backend registration.
acceptanceCriteria: App registers for remote notifications when permission granted
Device token is captured and stored (non-sensitive) and can be sent to backend when available
No device token is logged in full (mask or avoid logging)
Context7 consulted for APNs registration flow and iOS lifecycle concerns; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Deep links from notifications to Messages/Todos
userStories.description: Route notifications into the correct tab and detail screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification payload routing supports opening a specific PM thread or Todo detail
If app is locked/unauthenticated, route user to login then to destination
Routing logic is covered by unit tests where feasible
Context7 consulted for deep link routing patterns in SwiftUI apps; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Document push backend contract and privacy constraints
userStories.description: Define what server endpoints/payload fields are required for push, without building server-side yet.
acceptanceCriteria: Docs/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md updated with backend requirements for push registration & delivery
Docs/THREAT_MODEL.md updated for push metadata and minimization
Context7 consulted for minimal payload and privacy guidance; summary added to progress.txt
